### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
```

```














{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/cli.py",
  "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport json\r\nimport time\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\r\n\r\nimport httpx\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\n\r\napp = typer.Typer(help=\"MiniQueue CLI\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_base_url() -> str:\r\n    return \"http://localhost:8000\"\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _async_submit(\r\n    client: httpx.AsyncClient,\r\n    job_type: str,\r\n    payload: Dict[str, Any],\r\n    queue: str = \"default\",\r\n    max_attempts: int = 3,\r\n    run_at: Optional[str] = None,\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str] = None,\r\n) -> str:\r\n    body: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n        \"type\": job_type,\r\n        \"payload\": payload,\r\n        \"queue\": queue,\r\n        \"max_attempts\": max_attempts,\r\n    }\r\n    if run_at:\r\n        body[\"run_at\"] = run_at\r\n    if idempotency_key:\r\n        body[\"idempotency_key\"] = idempotency_key\r\n    resp = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=body)\r\n    resp.raise_for_status()\r\n    return resp.json()[\"job_id\"]\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef submit(\r\n    job_type: str = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Job type, e.g. sleep, http_get\"),\r\n    payload: str = typer.Argument(..., help=\"JSON payload or @file.json\"),\r\n    queue: str = typer.Option(\"default\", help=\"Queue name\"),\r\n    max_attempts: int = typer.Option(3, help=\"Maximum attempts\"),\r\n    run_at: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, help=\"RFC3339 timestamp for delayed run\"),\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, help=\"Idempotency key\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Submit a job via the HTTP API.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    if payload.startswith(\"@\"):\r\n        path = payload[1:]\r\n        with open(path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as REDACTED            payload_obj = json.load(f)\r\n    else:\r\n        payload_obj = json.loads(payload)\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            job_id = await _async_submit(\r\n                client,\r\n                job_type=job_type,\r\n                payload=payload_obj,\r\n                queue=queue,\r\n                max_attempts=max_attempts,\r\n                run_at=run_at,\r\n                idempotency_key=idempotency_key,\r\n            )\r\n        typer.echo(job_id)\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef status(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Show job status.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            resp = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\r\n            resp.raise_for_status()\r\n            data = resp.json()\r\n        typer.echo(json.dumps(data, indent=2, sort_keys=True))\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef cancel(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Request cancellation of a job.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            resp = await client.post(f\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\")\r\n            resp.raise_for_status()\r\n            data = resp.json()\r\n        typer.echo(json.dumps(data, indent=2, sort_keys=True))\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef retry(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Retry a FAILED or DEAD job.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            resp = await client.post(f\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\")\r\n            resp.raise_for_status()\r\n            data = resp.json()\r\n        typer.echo(json.dumps(data, indent=2, sort_keys=True))\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef tail(\r\n    since_seconds: int = typer.Option(30, help=\"How far back to start tailing from\"),\r\n    interval: float = typer.Option(2.0, help=\"Polling interval in seconds\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Tail recent job events via polling.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n    since = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(seconds=since_seconds)\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        nonlocal since\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            while True:\r\n                params = {\"limit\": 100, \"since\": since.isoformat()}\r\n                resp = await client.get(\"/job_events\", params=params)\r\n                resp.raise_for_status()\r\n                events = resp.json()\r\n                for ev in events:\r\n                    since = datetime.fromisoformat(ev[\"ts\"])\r\n                    typer.echo(\r\n                        f'{ev[\"ts\"]} {ev[\"job_id\"]} {ev[\"old_state\"]}->{ev[\"new_state\"]} {ev[\"message\"]}'\r\n                    )\r\n                await asyncio.sleep(interval)\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        asyncio.run(_run())\r\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\r\n        typer.echo(\"Stopped.\", err=True)\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef loadtest(\r\n    jobs: int = typer.Option(100, help=\"Number of jobs to submit\"),\r\n    concurrency: int = typer.Option(10, help=\"Number of concurrent submitters\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Submit many jobs concurrently and report throughput/latency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            start = time.monotonic()\r\n\r\n            sem = asyncio.Semaphore(concurrency)\r\n            job_ids: List[str] = []\r\n\r\n            async def submit_one(i: int) -> None:\r\n                async with sem:\r\n                    payload = {\"seconds\": 0.5}\r\n                    jid = await _async_submit(\r\n                        client,\r\n                        job_type=\"sleep\",\r\n                        payload=payload,\r\n                        queue=\"default\",\r\n                    )\r\n                    job_ids.append(jid)\r\n\r\n            await asyncio.gather(*(submit_one(i) for i in range(jobs)))\r\n\r\n            submitted_at = time.monotonic()\r\n\r\n            async def wait_for(jid: str) -> float:\r\n                t0 = time.monotonic()\r\n                while True:\r\n                    resp = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{jid}\")\r\n                    resp.raise_for_status()\r\n                    data = resp.json()\r\n                    if data[\"state\"] in {\"SUCCEEDED\", \"FAILED\", \"DEAD\", \"CANCELED\"}:\r\n                        return time.monotonic() - t0\r\n                    await asyncio.sleep(0.2)\r\n\r\n            latencies = await asyncio.gather(*(wait_for(jid) for jid in job_ids))\r\n            finished_at = time.monotonic()\r\n\r\n            submit_duration = submitted_at - start\r\n            total_duration = finished_at - start\r\n            throughput = jobs / total_duration if total_duration > 0 else 0.0\r\n\r\n            lat_sorted = sorted(latencies)\r\n            p50 = lat_sorted[int(0.5 * len(lat_sorted))]\r\n            p95 = lat_sorted[int(0.95 * len(lat_sorted)) - 1]\r\n\r\n            typer.echo(f\"Submitted {jobs} jobs in {submit_duration:.2f}s\")\r\n            typer.echo(f\"Total time until completion: {total_duration:.2f}s\")\r\n            typer.echo(f\"Throughput: {throughput:.2f} jobs/s\")\r\n            typer.echo(f\"Latency p50={p50:.2f}s p95={p95:.2f}s\")\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    app()\r\n\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

```
Content-Type: application/proto
```

### SIGNATURE ###

```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is %7B%221%3ALEN%22%3A%22REDACTED%22%2C%222%3ALEN%22%3A%22src%2Fminiqueue%2Fcli.py%22%2C%223%3ALEN%22%3A%22from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Basyncio%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Bjson%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Btime%5Cr%5Cnfrom%2Bdatetime%2Bimport%2Bdatetime%2C%2Btimedelta%2C%2Btimezone%5Cr%5Cnfrom%2Btyping%2Bimport%2BAny%2C%2BDict%2C%2BList%2C%2BOptional%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Bhttpx%5Cr%5Cnimport%2Btyper%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnapp%2B%3D%2Btyper.Typer%28help%3D%5C%22MiniQueue%2BCLI%5C%22%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cndef%2B_get_base_url%28%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2Bstr%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2B%5C%22http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A8000%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cnasync%2Bdef%2B_async_submit%28%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bclient%3A%2Bhttpx.AsyncClient%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_type%3A%2Bstr%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload%3A%2BDict%5Bstr%2C%2BAny%5D%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bqueue%3A%2Bstr%2B%3D%2B%5C%22default%5C%22%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmax_attempts%3A%2Bint%2B%3D%2B3%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Brun_at%3A%2BOptional%5Bstr%5D%2B%3D%2BNone%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bidempotency_key%3A%2BOptional%5Bstr%5D%2B%3D%2BNone%2C%5Cr%5Cn%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2Bstr%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbody%3A%2BDict%5Bstr%2C%2BAny%5D%2B%3D%2B%7B%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22type%5C%22%3A%2Bjob_type%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22payload%5C%22%3A%2Bpayload%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22queue%5C%22%3A%2Bqueue%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22max_attempts%5C%22%3A%2Bmax_attempts%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%7D%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Brun_at%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bbody%5B%5C%22run_at%5C%22%5D%2B%3D%2Brun_at%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Bidempotency_key%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bbody%5B%5C%22idempotency_key%5C%22%5D%2B%3D%2Bidempotency_key%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bresp%2B%3D%2Bawait%2Bclient.post%28%5C%22%2Fjobs%5C%22%2C%2Bjson%3Dbody%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bresp.raise_for_status%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bresp.json%28%29%5B%5C%22job_id%5C%22%5D%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5CREDACTED%28%29%5Cr%5Cndef%2Bsubmit%28%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_type%3A%2Bstr%2B%3D%2Btyper.Argument%28...%2C%2Bhelp%3D%5C%22Job%2Btype%2C%2Be.g.%2Bsleep%2C%2Bhttp_get%5C%22%29%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload%3A%2Bstr%2B%3D%2Btyper.Argument%28...%2C%2Bhelp%3D%5C%22REDACTED%5C%22%29%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bqueue%3A%2Bstr%2B%3D%2Btyper.Option%28%5C%22default%5C%22%2C%2Bhelp%3D%5C%22Queue%2Bname%5C%22%29%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmax_attempts%3A%2Bint%2B%3D%2Btyper.Option%283%2C%2Bhelp%3D%5C%22Maximum%2Battempts%5C%22%29%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Brun_at%3A%2BOptional%5Bstr%5D%2B%3D%2Btyper.Option%28None%2C%2Bhelp%3D%5C%22RFC3339%2Btimestamp%2Bfor%2Bdelayed%2Brun%5C%22%29%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bidempotency_key%3A%2BOptional%5Bstr%5D%2B%3D%2Btyper.Option%28None%2C%2Bhelp%3D%5C%22Idempotency%2Bkey%5C%22%29%2C%5Cr%5Cn%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2BNone%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22Submit%2Ba%2Bjob%2Bvia%2Bthe%2BHTTP%2BAPI.%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbase_url%2B%3D%2B_get_base_url%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Bpayload.startswith%28%5C%22%40%5C%22%29%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpath%2B%3D%2Bpayload%5B1%3A%5D%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bwith%2Bopen%28path%2C%2B%5C%22r%5C%22%2C%2Bencoding%3D%5C%22utf-8%5C%22%29%2Bas%2BREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload_obj%2B%3D%2Bjson.load%28f%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Belse%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload_obj%2B%3D%2Bjson.loads%28payload%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bdef%2B_run%28%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2BNone%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bhttpx.AsyncClient%28base_url%3Dbase_url%2C%2Btimeout%3D10.0%29%2Bas%2Bclient%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_id%2B%3D%2Bawait%2B_async_submit%28%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bclient%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_type%3Djob_type%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpayload%3Dpayload_obj%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bqueue%3Dqueue%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bmax_attempts%3Dmax_attempts%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Brun_at%3Drun_at%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bidempotency_key%3Didempotency_key%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Btyper.echo%28job_id%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basyncio.run%28_run%28%29%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5CREDACTED%28%29%5Cr%5Cndef%2Bstatus%28job_id%3A%2Bstr%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2BNone%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22Show%2Bjob%2Bstatus.%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbase_url%2B%3D%2B_get_base_url%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bdef%2B_run%28%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2BNone%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bhttpx.AsyncClient%28base_url%3Dbase_url%2C%2Btimeout%3D10.0%29%2Bas%2Bclient%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bresp%2B%3D%2Bawait%2Bclient.get%28f%5C%22%2Fjobs%2F%7Bjob_id%7D%5C%22%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bresp.raise_for_status%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bdata%2B%3D%2Bresp.json%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Btyper.echo%28json.dumps%28data%2C%2Bindent%3D2%2C%2Bsort_keys%3DTrue%29%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basyncio.run%28_run%28%29%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5CREDACTED%28%29%5Cr%5Cndef%2Bcancel%28job_id%3A%2Bstr%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2BNone%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22Request%2Bcancellation%2Bof%2Ba%2Bjob.%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbase_url%2B%3D%2B_get_base_url%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bdef%2B_run%28%29%2B-%5Cu003e%2BNone%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bhttpx.AsyncClient%28base_url%3Dbase_url%2C%2Btimeout%3D10.0%29%2Bas%2Bclient%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bresp%2B%3D%2Bawait%2Bclient.post%28f%5C%22%2Fjobs%2F%7Bjob_id%7D%2Fcancel%5C%22%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bresp.raise_for_status%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bdata%2B%3D%2Bresp.json%28%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B
```
